data.description:
Reassign every <h1>-<h6> in src/ to either .text-title (text-3xl md:text-5xl) or .text-subtitle (text-xl md:text-2xl). Replace ad-hoc heading sizes that currently range from text-2xl (Campus) to text-6xl (PeopleDirectory) for the same semantic level.

Per-site judgment is the bulk of the work — e.g., Campus's 'Meet the Space' likely subtitle (relative to page hero), PeopleDirectory's 'People' is title. Plan file records all assignments.

Spec: .lattice/notes/typography-spec-20260607.md.

Why: Same semantic heading level renders at wildly different sizes across pages. Creates inconsistent visual hierarchy. Depends on FRAC-51 foundation.

Acceptance: Every <h1>-<h6> uses .text-title or .text-subtitle (no ad-hoc text-* sizes on headings). Section structure on every page reviewed for title/subtitle correctness. Visual diff per page recorded in plan.
data.title: Heading size normalization — adopt .text-title and .text-subtitle

data.body:
Review verdict: PASS Diff: 11 files, 22 class-string migrations + 1 documentation comment. Scope discipline exemplary — no index.css, button.tsx, DESIGN.md, eyebrow/display/CTA territory touched. Acceptance criteria: all met. All 22 in-scope

-

sites use .text-title (15 sites), .text-subtitle (5 sites), .text-display (1 site, 404), or are documented as intentional exceptions (AvatarBadge). normal-case decisions match plan: 8 kept on Campus sentence/question/proper-noun headings, 3 dropped on single-word labels (Meet the Space, Events, Build with us.). DocumentBadge isFeatured prop still used for padding + description (not dead). Validation clean: build, typecheck, tests at 143/4 baseline, DESIGN.md lint 0 errors. Grep audit: zero leftover ad-hoc text-Nxl on headings. Only AvatarBadge retains font-serif on h3 (documented exception). Two visual-QA follow-up flags (medium risk, non-blocking): 1. NeighborhoodCampusDiagram pillar h3 grew from text-base/lg to text-xl/2xl (25-33% jump). Cards are w-[45%] (~154px) on mobile; long pillar titles like 'Community-run University' may wrap to 3+ lines and overflow circular layout. Verify at 375px post-merge; if it breaks, downgrade to bespoke smaller size or eyebrow utility. 2. Vision h2 lost its lg:text-7xl ceiling (was max ~72px+, now max 48px from .text-title). Centerpiece quote loses some presence on lg+. Also: inner vision? is now a no-op since utility makes whole quote italic. Accept as system default, OR add Vision-specific scale-up override as follow-up. Low-risk observations: Directory h3 lost font-medium (now weight 300 from .text-subtitle); 404 dropped 24px desktop size; Campus h2 growth intentional (the audit drift fix). Recommendation: merge. Both medium flags are post-merge follow-up candidates, not blockers.
